# bird-search (vendored)

Subset of [@steipete/bird](https://github.com/steipete/bird) v0.8.0 (MIT License, Peter Steinberger).

Vendored for CNS morning-digest Source 11 (X/Twitter GraphQL SearchTimeline). Browser cookie extraction via `@steipete/sweet-cookie` is **removed** — credentials are env-only (`X_AUTH_TOKEN`, `X_CT0` and aliases).

Provenance: `last30days-skill-reference/skills/last30days/scripts/lib/vendor/bird-search/`
